MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: D. Hakewill; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff N.R. Patel is present. Represented by
Attorney Arnold W. Evje, II, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant John Burdette is present.
Attorney Josh Scheiber representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Guy Stilson, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled, the trial date of OCT-17-2011 is vacated.
